messages.text:
Claude understands your codebase, makes edits with your permission, and
! for bash modeds — ridouble tap esc to clear        ctrl + z to suspend
@ for file paths      shift + tab to auto-accept     meta + o to toggle fast
/btw for side         ctrl + t to toggle tasks       ctrl + g to edit in
question              shift + ⏎ for newline          /keybindings to
customize
For more help: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview
Esc to cancel
